title: Ace in the Hole
writer: Billy Wilder, Lesser Samuels, Walter Newman
actors: Kirk Douglas, Jan Sterling, Robert Arthur
plot: Frustrated former journalist Chuck Tatum now working for an Albuquerque newspaper exploits a story about trading post owner Leo Minosa trapped in a cave to rekindle Chuck's career, but the story soon escalates into a media circus.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 5 wins & 3 nominations total
